Beauty that respects your skin barrier

We formulate from the outside in — supporting the skin's natural barrier instead of stripping it. The result is a calm, resilient complexion that looks lit from within. Every product begins in our Paris lab and ends in your routine.
Aesthetic of the Lumière Skin Paris laboratory
A few words from the people who wear Lumière every day.
Three weeks on the Hydra-Glow Serum and my fine lines look softer. My skin finally feels calm.
The Velvet Matte Lipstick lasts through coffee, meetings and dinner. I own four shades now.
I have sensitive skin and everything breaks me out. Lumière is the first brand that hasn't.
Are Lumière Skin products suitable for sensitive skin?
Yes. Every formula is dermatologically tested for sensitivity and free from synthetic fragrance, making them ideal for reactive and sensitive skin.
Are your products vegan and cruelty-free?
Absolutely. Lumière Skin is certified cruelty-free and 100% vegan — no animal-derived ingredients and no animal testing, ever.
We ship worldwide from our Paris HQ. Standard delivery takes 3–7 business days in Europe and 7–14 elsewhere.
Yes. Our serums and creams use reusable glass with low-waste refill pouches available in the shop.

Lumière Skin is a clean beauty house founded in Paris, crafting transparent, high-performance skincare and makeup for every skin type. Meet the team behind the glow.
The Lumière Skin founding team in the Paris studio
Lumière Skin began with a simple belief — that beautiful skin shouldn't come at the cost of your health or the planet.

We were tired of long ingredient lists we couldn't pronounce and claims we couldn't trust. So we built Lumière Skin to publish every formula, test everything, and prove that clean and effective can be the same thing.

Your evening ritual for barrier repair
Night is when skin rebuilds. Here's a soothing Lumière evening routine with Renew Night Cream, retinol and a barrier mask to wake up resilient.
A calm evening skincare setup with a lit candle
A gentle evening skincare routine for barrier repair using Lumière Skin Renew Night Cream, Retinol Renew Oil and Barrier Repair Mask.

While you sleep, your skin shifts into repair mode. An evening ritual should
support that work — not fight it with harsh, stripping steps.

## Cleanse, softly

Remove the day with a gentle cleanser. If you wore sunscreen or makeup,
a first pass with an oil or balm makes the second cleanse effortless.

## Treat with intention

Two to three nights a week, press in **Retinol Renew Oil** — encapsulated
retinol that smooths texture without the sting. On other nights, let
**Hydra-Glow Serum** do the hydrating.

## Seal with Renew Night Cream

**Renew Night Cream** is the star of barrier repair: peptides signal
collagen, ceramides rebuild the moisture barrier, and you wake up with
softer, more resilient skin.

## Once a week: Barrier Repair Mask

Add the **Barrier Repair Mask** for a cushioning boost when skin feels
tired or reactive.

> Consistency at night matters more than intensity. A calm routine, repeated,
> outperforms the occasional heroic one.

Want help building your evening plan? [Book a free consultation](/contact).

Niacinamide vs Vitamin C: how to use both
Can you use niacinamide and vitamin C together? Yes — here's how to layer Lumière's Bright-C Serum and Hydra-Glow Serum without irritation.
Two serum droppers side by side on a marble surface
Learn how to safely combine niacinamide and vitamin C in your routine with Lumière Skin's Bright-C Serum and Hydra-Glow Serum for brighter, calmer skin.

One of the most persistent skincare myths is that **niacinamide** and
**vitamin C** cancel each other out. They don't. Modern, well-formulated
actives get along just fine — and together they're a brightness powerhouse.

## What each one does

- **Niacinamide (B3)** calms redness, balances oil and refines the look of
  pores. It's the steady, supportive friend.
- **Vitamin C** brightens tone, fades the look of dark spots and defends
  against free radicals from pollution and sun.

## How to layer them

With Lumière, you have two easy options:

1. **Same routine, different times.** Vitamin C in the morning (under
   sunscreen), niacinamide at night with Renew Night Cream.
2. **Layered, with care.** If you prefer both in the AM, apply the lighter
   texture first, let it absorb for a minute, then follow with the next. Our
   stabilised Bright-C is buffered to pair comfortably with Hydra-Glow Serum.

## The takeaway

Don't fear combining actives — fear *overdoing* them. Start slowly, watch
your skin, and let consistency do the work. [Reach out](/contact) if you'd
like a tailored layering plan.

What each one does

  • Niacinamide (B3) calms redness, balances oil and refines the look of pores. It’s the steady, supportive friend.
  • Vitamin C brightens tone, fades the look of dark spots and defends against free radicals from pollution and sun.

How to layer them

With Lumière, you have two easy options:

  1. Same routine, different times. Vitamin C in the morning (under sunscreen), niacinamide at night with Renew Night Cream.
  2. Layered, with care. If you prefer both in the AM, apply the lighter texture first, let it absorb for a minute, then follow with the next. Our stabilised Bright-C is buffered to pair comfortably with Hydra-Glow Serum.

The takeaway

Don’t fear combining actives — fear overdoing them. Start slowly, watch your skin, and let consistency do the work. Reach out if you’d like a tailored layering plan.
Build a 3-step morning routine for glowing skin
A calm, effective morning ritual doesn't need ten products. Here's the three-step Lumière routine for luminous, balanced skin before 9am.
A bright bathroom shelf with morning skincare essentials
A simple, effective 3-step morning skincare routine using Lumière Skin cleanser, Hydra-Glow Serum and Daily Glow Moisturiser for glowing, balanced skin.

A glowing morning starts the night before — but the ritual you keep at the
sink sets the tone for the whole day. You don't need a shelf of ten steps.
You need three good ones, done consistently.

## Step 1 — Gentle cleanse

Skip the stripping foams. A soft, non-foaming cleanse removes overnight
build-up without disturbing your skin barrier. Splashing with lukewarm (never
hot) water helps too.

## Step 2 — Hydra-Glow Serum

Press two drops of **Hydra-Glow Serum** into damp skin. Hyaluronic acid pulls
in moisture while niacinamide calms and refines. This is where the "lit from
within" look comes from.

## Step 3 — Daily Glow Moisturiser

Seal it all with **Daily Glow Moisturiser**. Squalane softens, ceramides
lock hydration, and you're left with a dewy base that plays well under
makeup — or under nothing at all.

> Less, but better. Three steps, every morning, and your skin will tell the
> difference within two weeks.

Ready to personalise? [Book a free consultation](/contact) and we'll tune the
ritual to your skin type.
